message: chore: bump vite beta and hide build warnings

files.patch:
@@ -191,6 +191,9 @@ filter_build_output() {
         
         # npm/pnpm configuration warnings
         'npm warn Unknown.*config'
+        'deprecated subdependencies found'
+        'Issues with peer dependencies found'
+        'unmet peer'
         
         # Tailwind CSS content configuration warnings
         'warn - Your.*content.*configuration'

@@ -237,6 +237,6 @@ if [[ "$PRERELEASE_FLAG" != "not found" ]]; then
     else
         echo "⚠ IS_PRERELEASE_BUILD: '$PRERELEASE_FLAG' (unexpected value)"
     fi
-else
-    echo "⚠ IS_PRERELEASE_BUILD: not set (will use version string fallback)"
+elif [[ "${VERBOSE_BUILD:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
+    echo "IS_PRERELEASE_BUILD not set (Info.plist key missing)"
 fi
